originalTitle: Two people arrested in apparent marriage proposal atop Empire State Building
summary: Pair also unfurled a large black banner displaying a message of peace on top of New York City landmark
content: Two people were arrested following an apparent marriage proposal atop the Empire State Building’s spire on Wednesday, after they climbed to the very pinnacle of the New York City landmark – well above the level open to the public. The two people were identified as Angela Nikolau and Ivan Beerkus, two Russian “rooftoppers” who have conducted similar stunts in other cities including Tianjin, China, and Los Angeles. They were both wearing black clothing and appeared to be masked as they unfurled a large, black banner at the top of the skyscraper with the words: “When the power of love beats the love of power the ‌world knows peace.” It remained unclear how the pair made their way up the final stages of the building, which towers above midtown Manhattan at a height of 1,454ft (443 metres). Local media outlets reported a New York police department (NYPD) drone in the air, in addition to an NYPD helicopter near the scene monitoring the breathtaking stunt. Shortly after 12.30pm, the two climbed down to a slightly lower platform on the structure that holds the antenna atop the building. One person then got down on one knee, and after what appeared to be a proposal from a man to a woman, the two people hugged and kissed. Body-camera footage released by NYPD on Wednesday afternoon showed police apprehending the pair. “You can’t be up here,” an officer says. In a statement on Wednesday afternoon, the NYPD said: “On Wednesday, July 1, 2026 at approximately 1200 hours, two unknown individuals were observed on the antenna of the Empire State Building located 20 West 34 Street, within the confines of Midtown South Precinct. NYPD’s Emergency Services Unit responded. “Two individuals were taken into custody without incident. There are no reported injuries. Charges are pending, and the investigation remains ongoing,” the statement added. CBS News later reported the charges include burglary, criminal trespass and reckless endangerment. In a story posted on Instagram and featuring a video apparently taken at the top of the skyscraper, Nikolau wrote: “Currently at the Empire State Building[,] you can watch on the city webcam.” Around 1pm ET on Wednesday, Nikolau posted a series of photos appearing to show her atop the spire, including images of the apparent proposal and what appears to be an engagement ring on her hand. Another photo appeared to show her hand clasped with what appeared to be Beerkus’s against a backdrop of the city far below. Both Nikolau’s and Beerkus’s social media pages feature dozens of photos and videos showing the pair standing on high rises and bridges around the world. The NYPD recovered the banner, ABC reported. Reuters contributed reporting
chineseTitle: 两人因在帝国大厦顶上明显求婚而被捕
chineseSummary: 两人还在纽约市地标建筑顶部展开了一面巨大的黑色横幅，上面写着和平的信息
chineseContent: 周三，两人在帝国大厦尖顶求婚，当时两人爬上这座纽约市地标建筑的最高峰——远高于向公众开放的高度，随后被捕。这两人被确认为安吉拉·尼科劳（Angela Nikolau）和伊万·比尔库斯（Ivan Beerkus），这两名俄罗斯“屋顶人物”曾在中国天津和洛杉矶等其他城市进行过类似的特技表演。他们都穿着黑色衣服，似乎戴着面具，在摩天大楼的顶部展开了一面巨大的黑色横幅，上面写着：“当爱的力量战胜了权力之爱时，世界就知道和平了。”目前尚不清楚两人是如何爬上这座高 1,454 英尺（443 米）的大楼的最后阶段的。当地媒体报道称，纽约警察局 (NYPD) 的一架无人机在空中飞行，此外，现场附近还有一架纽约警察局的直升机正在监视这一令人惊叹的特技表演。中午 12 点 30 分后不久，两人爬下楼顶天线固定结构上的一个稍低的平台。然后一个人单膝跪下，在看似男人向女人求婚后，两个人拥抱亲吻。纽约警察局周三下午发布的随身摄像机镜头显示，警方逮捕了这两人。 “你不能在这里，”一名警官说。纽约警察局在周三下午的一份声明中表示：“2026 年 7 月 1 日星期三大约 1200 时，在中城南分局西 34 街 20 号的帝国大厦天线上观察到两名身份不明的人。纽约警察局紧急服务部门做出了回应。“两人被拘留，没有发生任何事件。目前还没有受伤报告。指控正在审理中，我
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
